nasb.text: For cross to the coastlands of Kittim and see, And send to Kedar and observe closely And see if there has been such a thing as this!

esv.text: For cross to the coasts of Cyprus and see, or send to Kedar and examine with care; see if there has been such a thing.

cnv.text: “你們儘管過到基提海島察看， 派人去基達仔細查考， 看看曾有這樣的事沒有。

ccb.text: 你们去对岸的基提看看， 派人去基达仔细观察一下， 看看有没有这样的事？
